warning.title: Shanghai Central Meteorological Observatory issues a blue gale warning [Level IV/General]
warning.text: At 10:30 on April 3, 2023, the Shanghai Central Meteorological Observatory issued a blue gale warning [Level IV/General]: Affected by a Jianghuai cyclone, southeasterly winds of force 6 with gusts of force 7-8 are expected across most of the city before tomorrow evening, with force 7 winds and gusts of force 8-9 along rivers and coastal areas. Take precautions against the adverse effects of strong winds on work at height, transportation, and protected agriculture.
